title: lippia hispida
intro: Lippia hispida, also known as the rough-leaved lippia or wild marjoram, is a shrub-like plant native to South Africa. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lippia hispida include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
